summary: Iteration 111: Tested PIN Regeneration for employees with existing PINs and Platform Fee Calculator features. All 7 backend tests passed. All UI features verified working.

issues: Console hydration warning about <span> inside <tbody> - React DOM nesting issue but doesn't affect functionality

seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test platforms during testing. PIN regeneration was tested - PINs were regenerated for existing employees.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 111 verified all requested features: 1) PIN Regeneration works for employees with existing PINs - refresh icon button visible next to PIN badge, clicking regenerates PIN and shows success toast. 2) Platform Reconciliation Summary API returns expected_fee, expected_received, commission_rate, processing_fee per platform, and total_expected_fee at root level. 3) Platform Reconciliation Page has 4 summary cards (Total Online Sales, Total Received, Expected Fees, Actual Platform Cut). 4) Platform cards show commission rate badge (e.g., 20%), expected fee column, and variance column. 5) Auto Fee Calculator dialog shows when selecting a platform with total sales, commission rate, expected fee, expected received, already received, remaining to receive, and auto-fill button. 6) Fee Settings dialog (gear icon) allows editing commission_rate and processing_fee with preview calculation. 7) Platform CRUD accepts processing_fee field on both POST and PUT.

1_pin_regeneration_backend.details: POST /api/cashier/generate-pin/{employee_id} returns new PIN even for employees who already have a PIN

2_pin_regeneration_ui.details: Refresh icon button visible next to PIN badge for employees with existing PINs (Ahmed Khan, aaaa)

3_platform_reconciliation_summary_api.details: GET /api/platform-reconciliation/summary returns expected_fee, expected_received, commission_rate, processing_fee per platform, and total_expected_fee

4_platform_reconciliation_summary_cards.details: 4 summary cards visible: Total Online Sales (SAR 3,500.00), Total Received (SAR 0.00), Expected Fees (SAR 692.50 with 19.8% of sales), Actual Platform Cut (SAR 3,500.00)

5_platform_cards_commission_badge.details: Each platform card shows commission rate badge (20% for HungerStation, 15% for Keta)

6_platform_cards_expected_fee_column.details: Expected Fee column visible on platform cards (SAR 670.00 for HungerStation, SAR 22.50 for Keta)

7_platform_cards_variance_column.details: Variance column shows difference between actual and expected fees

8_auto_fee_calculator_dialog.details: Record Payment dialog shows Auto Fee Calculator when platform selected with: total sales, commission rate, expected fee, expected you receive, already received, remaining to receive, auto-fill button

9_fee_settings_dialog.details: Clicking gear icon opens Fee Settings dialog with commission rate input, processing fee input, example calculation preview, and save button

10_platform_crud_processing_fee.details: POST /api/platforms accepts processing_fee field and returns it in response. PUT /api/platforms/{id} accepts processing_fee and updates correctly.
